# agentic_I2 explorer-read · S22-T1-A-E2
from email.mime.multipart import MIMEMultipart
from email.mime.application import MIMEApplication
msg = MIMEMultipart('mixed')
msg['Subject'] = 'Test'
att = MIMEApplication(b'x', Name='a.txt')
att['Content-Disposition'] = 'attachment; filename="a.txt"'
msg.attach(att)
print('a.txt' in msg.as_string())

exercises.code:
# agentic_I2 explorer-read · S22-T2-A-E3
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta
now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
for exp in (now - timedelta(minutes=1), now + timedelta(hours=1)):
    print('refresh' if exp < now else 'valid')

exercises.code:
# agentic_I2 explorer-read · S22-T3-A-E3
a, b = 'ana.rojas@example.pe', 'ana.rojas@example.com'
valor = 0
for x, y in zip(a, b):
    if x != y:
        break
    valor += 1
score = valor / max(len(a), len(b))
print(round(score, 2), 'match_no_es_fraude')
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer S22-T3-A-E3: partí del starterCode e instruction del quiz_card «E3 (transferencia) — Concepto: score + nota match_no_es_fraude. selfcheck.chosen_text: Solo drafts/.eml en sandbox y aprobación humana
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Explorer S22 Q0: leí la teoría del quiz_card («{"subtopicId": "S22-T1-A", "heading": "MIME, encoding, HTML/text y attachments", "paragraphs": ["**MIME** (`email.mime`)…») y la pregunta «¿Qué garantiza no enviar correo real en el gate de S22?». La opción [1] «Solo drafts/.eml en sandbox y aprobación humana» es la que alinea con el outcome/iDo del paquete; las demás contradicen el material enseñado (venv/aislar, tipos, contratos, etc. según la sección).
